pageContext.name: The Last One
pageContext.description: Sideshow Art Prints presents The Last One Fine Art Print, an epic high fantasy illustration by artist Greg Rutkowski.  Greg Rutkowski has cemented himself in the modern fantasy canon through both popular licensed art and completely original works. The Last One depicts a battle of mythic proportions as hundreds of armored knights charge through the valley where a dragon looms. They raise their spears and war banners high while the mighty lizard's flames burn hot enough to scorch the mountains above. Rising ash gives the scene a hazy coloration, obscuring the dragon and turning the battlefield into a roiling sea of silver-clad soldiers.  Each The Last One Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 250 pieces. Available unframed and in a custom framed format, this legendary dragon artwork makes a treasured addition to any fantasy collector's home.  Turn up the heat and bring home The Last One Fine Art Print by Greg Rutkowski for your collection today!
